name: Melokakaronia Me Smigdali (Fenekia)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the oil with the sugar for about 30 minutes until light and fluffy.
2. Add cognac, baking powder dissolved in orange juice, and grated orange rind. Mix well.
3. Gradually add flour and farina, kneading thoroughly to combine all ingredients into a medium-soft dough.
4. Shape the melokakaronia into mounded ovals, flat on the bottom. Scrape the top lightly with a fork to create shallow grooves.
5. Place the cookies on a buttered cookie sheet and bake in a preheated 250°F oven for 20 to 30 minutes until golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
7. While cooling, prepare the syrup by boiling water, sugar, and honey in a saucepan. Skim off any froth as it rises. Boil for about 3 minutes.
8. Dip cooled cookies into the warm syrup using a slotted spoon. Carefully remove and drain on a clean platter.
9. Sprinkle chopped walnuts over the cooled cookies.
10. Mix cinnamon and sugar together and sprinkle on top of the caramel-coated cookies.
